title: Rename 'By Type' Filter to 'Analytics Type' and Move to Top of Filter List
story: As a DataTools Pro user, I want the type filter to be clearly labeled 'Analytics Type' and positioned at the top of the filter list, so that the most important filter is immediately visible and clearly described.
description:
The filter labeled 'By Type' on the Reports and Dashboards page needs to be renamed and repositioned.

## Changes
1. Rename 'By Type' to 'Analytics Type'
2. Move 'Analytics Type' to the first position in the filter list
acceptance_criteria: Filter formerly labeled 'By Type' now reads 'Analytics Type'
'Analytics Type' is the first filter in the filter list
Filter functionality remains unchanged after rename and reposition
ux_changes: Renamed 'By Type' filter to 'Analytics Type' and moved it to the top of the filter list on the Reports and Dashboards page.
implementation_notes: Label text and DOM order updated for the filter dropdown.
comment_summary: Developer requested clarification on scope, then renamed the filter and moved it to the top position. Confirmed working on staging.
